subcodes.first_line: O Aristotle, who is known as the First Teacher, distinguished in all sciences above all nations, and renowned among men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ارسطو معلم اول را گویند که در جمیع علوم ممتاز کل امم بود و از مشاهیر بنی
subcodes.subjects: @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
